name: cli
description: Cross-cutting CLI infrastructure. Provides the root command, version subcommand, and subcommand registration framework using cobra.

requirements.title: Root command and subcommand registration
requirements.description: A top-level cobra root command that registers all module subcommands, sets global flags, and prints help when invoked with no args or an unknown command.

requirements.title: Version command
requirements.description: A `spex version` subcommand that prints version string and build info injected at build time via ldflags.

components.name: RootCommand
components.description: Top-level `spex` command. Registers all subcommands, sets global flags, prints help when invoked with no args.

components.name: VersionCommand
components.description: `spex version` — prints version and build info injected via ldflags at build time.

data_flows.name: Command Dispatch
data_flows.description: How user input flows from argv through cobra to the correct subcommand handler.
